titleStmt.title: SII 35.15: original edition by D. M. Nagaraju
No. 15. (A.R. No. 102 of 1952-53.) IṬAGI, RON TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Stone set up inside the Śambhuliṅga temple.
This inscription refers itself to the reign of Trailōkyamalladēva and is dated in Śaka 976, Jaya, Jyēshṭha, Amāvāsyā, solar eclipse corresponding to 1054 A.D., May 10, Tuesday.

It states that the mahāgrahāra Iṭṭage included in the Kisukāḍu-nāḍu was the native place of the king's subordinate Śrīpatichamūpa. Describes the Mahājanas of the village and the teacher Bonteyadēva who belonged to this place and resided at Kanakapura (i.e. Hoṁbaḷ). Registers a gift of land to the teacher Mallikārjuna, disciple of Bonteyadēva, for god Svayaṁbhu by the Mahājanas of the place headed by the Ūroḍeya. Also registers gifts to the same god made by Ūroḍeya Vikkarasa of Kisukāḍu-nāḍu, the residents of Honneganūr and others.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī svastijayaścābhyudayaśca . namastuṁgaśirastuṁgacaṁdracāmaracāravē trailōkyanagarāraṁ
bhamūlastaṁbhaṁca śaṁbhavē
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyā
śrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatraiḷōkyamalladēvavijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhi pravarddha
mānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire . v® . śrīyanurasthaḷadoḷu śrīyaṁjihvāgradoḷu nega
ḷteyaci śrī jeyaṁ traiḷōkyamallanōppirataḷyadaṁ . v® . māḷavacōḷapāṁḍyamaga
rādiparaṁ bhujaga ṁ pa ḷa kāḷiṁgagūrjjarasaurāṣṭramahiśaranaṭṭimuṭṭa Ābhiḷakarāḷamaṁ
sudakya ma lla bhūpāḷakaṁnoludu rakṣisi samarppasidaṁ nijadēśakōśadoḷu . va . Āma
hārāja prithvi daḷamaṁ duṣṭanigraha śiṣṭapratipāḷanapurassaraṁ sukhadināḷuttamire tatpā
dapadmōpajīvi . kaṁ . yi yaliṟiyalna śaraṇbuge kāyalu śrīpaticamūpanalladepeṟa
yalke kiṟiyalkārppava kāyalkārpavasamaṁtu maṟevokkavaraṁ . va . Ā mahānubhāvanave
vi ya vaṁśāvatāramaṁ puṭṭida grāmada mahimeyumaṁ pēḷvaḍe . kaṁ . pari
ḷado da paripakvaṁsugaṁdhaśāḷiyiṁ bhōgigaḷiṁ paramātmagrihadinoppuvapuradiṁ kisukā
sutirkkuṁ . taddēśābhyaṁtaradoḷū . vri . smarahāranirppanisthaḷadoḷeṁdu caturmmu
ki yiṁ surapuraṁdoṁdu śōbhegepadirmmaḍi celvenemāḍi tatpurāṁ
ṇya puṁṇyamahimāspadaraṁ dvijaraṁ sarāgadiṁ darisidaneṁdāḍiṭṭagege paḷsama nāva
ṟa yoḷū . va . Ā mahāgrahāradūroḍeya pramukha mahājanadamahāma
ṁ pēḷvaḍe . kaṁ . paripūrnnavēdavēdyarpparōpakārapravīṇaraghavidvaṁsarpparanāri dūrarveṁdurbbale
baranaharnnisaṁ stutiyisuguṁ . ka . dīnānāthabudhōttamarggā naṁdadoḷiva peṁpinuṁ
yiṁdaṁ kānīnananiḷisuvarabhimānigaḷi rājaniṭṭakāpuradēvarggaḷū . Avaroḷage . kaṁ . para
taramayamahimarpparanāridūrariṣṭaśiṣṭā dārarpparave puruṣārtthadeḍeyoḷu pariṇa
ṭṭageya śatata nāyakavarggaṁ . mattaṁ boṁteyadēvara mahāmahimyeyaṁ pēḷvaḍe . mattaṁ .
maprōnmattahastipradaḷanu mṛgarājūghanakrodalyabhaprōdu bhūtāṁ bhūdavāyurmmada
nahātabhugnāna haruśādriṁśaṁbaḥ Ājñasiddhaḥ praśāṁtaḥ sakaḷatanubhṛtāmātta kāruṁṇya cittaḥ kaṁ
thācāryya bratīśaḥ kanakapuranivāsī babhūvātrabhūmauśrāka . tasyavadūtaḥ kēdārastapasvi ma
llikārjjuna bratitriyādiṁ nirbbāṇi paṁcaśiṣṭābhavaṁtike . sakakālātītasaṁvatsaraśaka 979 neya ja
yasaṁvatsarada jēṣṭadamāvāse maṁgaḷavāra sūryagrahaṇadoḷu vūroḍeya pramukhamahā
janaṁ mallikārjunagurugaḷige dhārāpūrbbakaṁ māḍikoṭṭaru śrīsvayaṁbhudēvara Aṁgabhōga raṁgabhōga khaṁḍassu
ṭita jīrnnōdārakkaṁ biṭṭa mattaru 12 kaṁ sarbbanamasya Adakke sīme muguḷiya dāriyiṁ teṁkalu vūroḍe
yara mānyadiṁ mūḍalu . rājēsvaradēvariṁge sūḷeyakeṟeyiṁ baḍagalu kisumattaru kaṁ sarbbanamasyabelow thekaṁsa¨rbbanamasya
mma 450 koḷagadāya poṁge hāga baḷḷavatta Ā koḷagada māna 1 mattaṁ dēvara naṁdādīvigege gāṇa 52 . po
ḍagivaḷḷadiṁ paḍuvalu tōṭa mattaru 1 kaṁma 450 . mattaṁ kisukāḍanāḍiṁge vūro ḍeya vikkarasaru svayaṁbhudē
varige biṭṭa mattaru 12 kaṁ sarbbanamasya keṟyeyakeyiṁ baḍagalu haḷḷada teṁka taḍi . mattaṁ sōmavārasūbelow the linekaṁsa¨rbbanamasya
ryyagrahaṇadoḷu vūroḍeya mahājanaṁgaḷu heggaḍeballayyaṁ mukhyavāgi dhānyagoḷaga
maṁ biṭṭaru . mattaṁ hoṁnneganūra vūroḍeya samasta praje tamma svakāryyakaṁ yiṭṭage
ge baṁdu svayaṁbhudēvarige dhānyagoḷagamaṁ biṭṭaru . vūroḷage maṭha 1 koḷagada mane 1
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasundharā ṣaṣṭirvvaṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . dānaṁvā pāla
naṁ vēti dānāccrēyānupālanaṁ dānātsvargamavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 35.15 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
